Tweet by @michael_chomsky (Michael)
Author bio: https://t.co/wP5OsA9afm • https://t.co/U1VfQ4K0Bq • https://t.co/UPVdiCl5mL • https://t.co/fqOT3A6IgP. Most startup problems can be solved w/ 100M views.
Text: I've had early access.

It's nuts. The thesis here is 'spend as much compute as you need to solve a task'

Most harnesses are a sharp knife that carefully execute your task. 

This is a railgun. Maybe a nuke. 

Definitely not for the token poor. https://t.co/vgf6RVBG0S
